info.name: HR.ai Phase 1-2 API
info.description: Combined Phase 1-2 collection grouped by module folders. Each request includes example success and relevant error responses where practical.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Module-level Postman collection for authentication routes. Includes employee, HR admin, and IT admin login helpers plus saved success/error responses.

request.description: Login using employee email and store the returned JWT bearer token in `bearerToken`.
Login using hr_admin email and store the returned JWT bearer token in `bearerToken`.
Login using it_admin email and store the returned JWT bearer token in `bearerToken`.
Return current trusted session context from bearer token.

item.name: Health
item.description: Module-level Postman collection for health routes. Includes healthy and degraded response examples, including LRU cache status.

request.description: Check overall service health and dependency status.

response.name: 200 OK - Degraded

item.name: Actions
item.description: Module-level Postman collection for action review, update, execution, and result lookup.

request.description: List actions visible to the current bearer token scope. Employees see only their own actions, while HR Admin can review company actions.

response.name: 403 Forbidden - IT Admin Token

request.description: Get one action inside the current company/session scope.

response.name: 200 OK - Action Detail
response.body:
{
  "id": "50000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001",
  "company_id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001",
  "employee_id": "20000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000004",
  "conversation_id": "40000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001",
  "type": "document_generation",
  "title": "Generate salary slip for March 2026",
  "summary": "Prepare a payroll document and deliver it to the employee.",
  "status": "pending",
  "priority": "medium",
  "sensitivity": "low",
  "delivery_channels": [
    "email",
    "in_app"
  ],
  "payload": {
    "type": "document_generation",
    "document_type": "salary_slip",
    "template_key": "payroll_salary_slip_v1",
    "parameters": {
      "month": 3,
      "year": 2026
    }
  },
  "execution_result": null,
  "metadata": {},
  "last_executed_at": null,
  "created_at": "2026-04-03T10:15:00Z",
  "updated_at": "2026-04-03T10:15:00Z"
}

request.description: Update action metadata or status. Requires HR Admin.

response.name: 403 Forbidden - Employee Token

request.description: Execute one action and queue delivery work items. Requires HR Admin. Sensitive actions are normalized to manual review.

response.name: 403 Forbidden - Employee Token

request.description: Get the latest stored execution result for one action. Accessible to the employee owner and HR Admin.

item.name: Rules
item.description: Module-level Postman collection for rule configuration and HR Admin enable/disable flow.

request.description: List action-generation rules. Requires HR Admin or IT Admin.

response.name: 403 Forbidden - Employee Token

request.description: Get one rule and its action templates.

response.name: 200 OK - Rule Detail
response.body:
{
  "id": "70000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001",
  "company_id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001",
  "name": "Payroll document follow-up",
  "description": "Generate a salary slip when the payroll request intent is resolved.",
  "trigger": "conversation_resolved",
  "intent_key": "payroll_document_request",
  "sensitivity_threshold": "medium",
  "is_enabled": true,
  "actions": [
    {
      "action_type": "document_generation",
      "title_template": "Generate salary slip",
      "summary_template": "Prepare payroll document for delivery.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "delivery_channels": [
        "email",
        "in_app"
      ],
      "payload_template": {
        "document_type": "salary_slip"
      }
    }
  ],
  "created_at": "2026-04-03T10:25:00Z",
  "updated_at": "2026-04-03T10:25:00Z"
}

request.description: Create one rule and its mapped action templates. Requires IT Admin.

response.name: 403 Forbidden - HR Admin Cannot Create

request.description: Toggle one rule using HR Admin or update full configuration using IT Admin.

response.name: 403 Forbidden - HR Admin Template Change

request.description: Delete one rule and its action mappings. Requires IT Admin.

response.name: 403 Forbidden - HR Admin Cannot Delete

item.name: Webhooks
item.description: Module-level Postman collection for webhook registration and maintenance.

request.description: List webhook registrations. Requires IT Admin.

response.name: 403 Forbidden - HR Admin Cannot Read

request.description: Get one webhook registration. Requires IT Admin.
Create one webhook registration and store the signing secret. Requires IT Admin.

response.name: 403 Forbidden - HR Admin Cannot Create

request.description: Update one webhook registration. Requires IT Admin.

response.name: 403 Forbidden - HR Admin Cannot Update

request.description: Delete one webhook registration. Requires IT Admin.

response.name: 403 Forbidden - HR Admin Cannot Delete
